arts.ttl: Gosens’ journey: From Inter struggles to Fiorentina revival
arts.sum: Robin Gosens’ move to Inter Milan in January 2022 seemed like the perfect stepping stone for his career. Despite his declining form at Atalanta, many believed he would be an incredible reinforcement for Simone Inzaghi’s left flank. However, the German player never managed to become a key figure at Inter, except for a few sporadic appearances. Calciomercato detail how Gosens, now a pillar at Fiorentina after a season in Germany with Union Berlin, has shed light on his unsuccessful stint in Milan. “I asked myself many times what went wrong. For me, it was the right step at the right The post Gosens’ journey: From Inter struggles to Fiorentina revival appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Inter: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Fiorentina prepare for their upcoming Conference League match, manager Raffaele Palladino is expected to make significant changes to his starting lineup. This rotation policy has been a hallmark of Palladino’s approach to European fixtures, with the coach often fielding an almost entirely different team compared to Serie A matches. Key players like Moise Kean, Robin Gosens, and David de Gea are likely to return to the starting XI. Kean, in particular, is on the verge of a personal milestone, needing just one more goal to reach double figures in a league campaign for only the second time in his The post Serie A | Fiorentina v Inter: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Borja Valero: ‘At Inter, Conte didn’t want me, so I made him change his mind’
arts.sum: Former Inter and Fiorentina midfielder Borja Valero shared insights on his career and current football landscape in a recent interview with Gazzetta dello Sport. The Spaniard, who still resides in Florence and is affectionately known as “the mayor” there, reflected on his time at both clubs and the upcoming match between them. When asked about Fiorentina’s potential this season, Valero expressed optimism: “It’s a golden moment. The hope for all of us who are tied to this shirt and these fans is that it lasts as long as possible. arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog inc Fiorentina-Inter, Torino-Napoli, Lecce-Juventus
Fiorentina and Inter to remain in the chase
arts.sum: Fiorentina have won only one of their 14 meetings with Inter in Serie A since the 2017-18 season (D5 L8); meanwhile Viola have failed to score in their last two league games against the Nerazzurri but haven’t recorded a longer run of consecutive goalless matches in the competition against them since doing so between December 2007 and November 2009 (5 in a row). Inter have won six of their last eight matches against Fiorentina in Serie A (D1 L1) and since the beginning of the 2020-21 season no team has beaten the Viola more times in the top-flight (Milan also six).
